profile.name: Pham Thi Van Anh
profile.headline: Digital Marketing Leader & Campaign Strategist
profile.availability: Available April – December 2026 (Singapore Student Pass valid until Jan 2027)
profile.bio: A digital marketing leader with a passion for building brand narratives that connect and convert. With hands-on experience leading campaigns for global brands and high-growth startups, Van Anh bridges the gap between creative vision and measurable results. Trained in international communications and marketing strategy at ESSEC Business School and the Diplomatic Academy of Vietnam, she thrives in environments that demand both analytical rigour and bold storytelling.

campaigns.name: Soirée by Sephora
campaigns.target_audience: Beauty enthusiasts, fashion-conscious consumers, luxury self-care seekers in Vietnam
campaigns.insight: Nightwear as a self-care ritual — a moment of personal indulgence that elevates everyday life
campaigns.summary: Premium campaign concept for Sephora's nightwear collection launch — positioned around luxury self-care rituals with 'Soirée' evening party narrative, KOL activation, and premium event concept

campaigns.name: AB InBev Market Share Expansion
campaigns.target_audience: Vietnamese beer consumers across on-trade and off-trade channels
campaigns.insight: Consumer preference shifts in Vietnam favor premium and craft beer experiences, requiring localised brand storytelling
campaigns.summary: Strategic market penetration campaign for AB InBev's beer portfolio targeting the Vietnamese market with consumer insights-driven segmentation, on-trade activation, and retail partnerships

campaigns.name: MoMo Super App User Growth
campaigns.target_audience: Existing MoMo users in Vietnam; new-to-feature and lapsed users
campaigns.insight: Users have entrenched habits around payment apps — feature adoption requires making discovery feel rewarding and social rather than transactional
campaigns.summary: Growth marketing campaign for MoMo's new feature set (gifting, digital cards, payments) through gamified onboarding, referral programs, and in-app notifications for Vietnam's largest e-wallet

campaigns.name: Violent vs. Compassionate Communication Framework
campaigns.target_audience: Internal communications, customer service, team management contexts
campaigns.insight: Communication breakdowns follow predictable patterns — compassionate response frameworks can prevent escalation and build empathy
campaigns.summary: Comprehensive communication strategy framework contrasting violent vs. compassionate communication styles with trigger identification, response frameworks, and scenario-based guides for professional application

campaigns.name: Dyson Love Edition 2026
campaigns.target_audience: Affluent Vietnamese consumers, luxury self-gifters, premium gifting occasions
campaigns.insight: Premium home appliances become meaningful gift items when positioned as expressions of care and self-investment
campaigns.summary: Campaign concept for Dyson's 'Love Edition' 2026 launch — vanity hub strategy, ritual design language, and gifting season activation positioning Dyson as emotional gift items

campaigns.name: PNJ × TikTok 'Discover My Character'
campaigns.target_audience: Gen Z consumers in Vietnam interested in fashion, self-expression, and jewellery
campaigns.insight: Gen Z engages with brands that enable self-expression — jewellery TikTok challenge creates organic, shareable content without hard selling
campaigns.summary: Multi-channel brand campaign for PNJ jewellery in partnership with TikTok — centered on 'Discover My Character' competition leveraging KOL content, TikTok challenge, and offline event activation

campaigns.name: NFT Market Development — Vietnam
campaigns.target_audience: Digital collectors, crypto-native users, Vietnamese creative communities
campaigns.insight: Vietnam has high crypto adoption but limited NFT market infrastructure — education and community building are prerequisites to product launch success
campaigns.summary: Strategic campaign for developing NFT market presence in Vietnam — market research, community building via Discord/Telegram, and education strategy to drive Web3 adoption

campaigns.name: Glaze New Product Launch
campaigns.target_audience: Early adopters, trend-conscious consumers, social media-engaged demographic
campaigns.insight: A phased launch (tease → launch → partner → amplify) creates compounding momentum — each phase feeds the next
campaigns.summary: Multi-product launch framework combining TikTok teaser, Instagram launch, B2B partnership seeding, and event amplification — scalable campaign structure for consumer product launches

campaigns.name: Last Bite Best Bite
campaigns.target_audience: Transit travellers at Vietnamese airports seeking authentic local food experiences
campaigns.insight: The last food experience before a journey carries emotional weight — positioning authentic local cuisine as the 'final highlight' differentiates from generic airport food
campaigns.summary: MVP concept and launch campaign for airport food brand focused on authentic local cuisine — brand identity, pop-up activation strategy, and traveller engagement framework

faq_seed.question: Who is Van Anh?
faq_seed.answer: Pham Thi Van Anh is a digital marketing leader and campaign strategist based in Singapore. She has a passion for building brand narratives that connect and convert, with hands-on experience leading campaigns for global brands and high-growth startups. She holds an MSc in Marketing Management & Digital from ESSEC Business School (admitted with scholarship, QS #2 ranking) and a BA in International Communication & Culture from the Diplomatic Academy of Vietnam.

faq_seed.question: What experience does she have at Dell Technologies?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh worked as a Digital Marketing Assistant at Dell Technologies (Apr 2022–Apr 2023) supporting global OEM solutions marketing for the Vietnam market. She produced website content, email campaigns, PR content, and social media assets; organised monthly webinars that increased engagement by 40% and conversion by 25%; tracked performance from 1,000+ calls per week; and supported international Dell events with 450+ global participants in Vietnam and Singapore.

faq_seed.question: What campaigns has she worked on?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh has led 9+ marketing campaigns including: Sephora's 'Soirée' nightwear launch (2024), AB InBev market penetration (2024), MoMo super app user growth campaign (2024), Dyson's 'Love Edition 2026' brand campaign, PNJ × TikTok 'Discover My Character' social campaign (2023), Glaze new product launch (2023), NFT market development strategy for Vietnam (2023), and the 'Last Bite Best Bite' airport food MVP brand (2023).

faq_seed.question: What did she do at DarkHorseStocks?
faq_seed.answer: At DarkHorseStocks (Jul 2024–Jul 2025), Van Anh served as Digital Marketing Project Manager. She managed multi-channel campaigns across Telegram (15k+), Instagram (7.6k), and Twitter (5.2k); built an email marketing automation system using AWS SES; scaled LinkedIn to 46,000+ subscribers; and leveraged a 35,000+ WhatsApp API network for marketing distribution. She also built automated reporting dashboards for performance tracking.

faq_seed.question: What are her strongest skills?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh's core strengths are in Brand Strategy, Campaign Planning & Execution, Content Marketing, Social Media Marketing, Marketing Analytics, and Marketing Analytics. She also has strong product development, data analysis (Python), and stakeholder management skills. Key tools include Google Analytics, Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, LinkedIn Campaign Manager, AWS SES, HubSpot, Mailchimp, and Canva.

faq_seed.question: What is her UNIQLO experience?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh participated in UNIQLO's Manager Candidate program (Jun 2023–Jun 2024) across Japan and Vietnam. She managed daily store operations generating 75,000+ items; led and trained a team of 54 staff; implemented weekly sales and merchandising strategies; contributed to 112% sales growth in peak months; and maintained 92–98% monthly target achievement. She was promoted to Assistant Store Manager during this period.

faq_seed.question: What is her Ferrero experience?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh worked as a Project Management Consultant at Ferrero in Singapore (Jan–Apr 2026). She conducted consumer and sales data analysis for the Singapore FMCG confectionery market; benchmarked 6 FMCG brands with SWOT analysis; identified key functional and emotional brand insights; and developed a marketing activation strategy integrating digital engagement and experiential campaigns.

faq_seed.question: What awards has she won?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh has won several awards: Best Delegate at Japan Youth Summit — Sustainable Business Idea Summit (2024); Bronze Medal (Top 3) at the Kaohsiung International Invention & Design Expo (2023); Top 3 / 1,200 at Vietnam Young Lion Student Leagues (2022); Top 3 / 1,400 at Hanh Trinh Kinh Doanh Business Case Study Competition (2022); and was Top 2 / 200 in her International Communications MA cohort at the Diplomatic Academy of Vietnam.

faq_seed.question: Where is she based and is she available for work?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh is based in Singapore and is available for opportunities from April to December 2026. Her Singapore Student Pass is valid until January 2027. She can be reached at vananhcindy02@gmail.com or +65 81586466, and her LinkedIn is linkedin.com/in/pham-thi-van-anh.

faq_seed.question: What is her educational background?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh is currently completing an MSc in Marketing Management & Digital at ESSEC Business School (2025–2026), admitted with a scholarship and ranked QS Business Master's #2 globally. She previously earned a BA in International Communication & Culture from the Diplomatic Academy of Vietnam (2020–2023, GPA 3.62, Top 5%) and an MA in International Communications from the same institution (Top 2/200). She also holds certifications from Tomorrow Marketers (Case Master, 2023–2024), University of Pennsylvania (Business & Marketing, 2023), and Udemy.

faq_seed.question: What makes her profile stand out?
faq_seed.answer: Van Anh combines a rare blend of analytical rigour and creative storytelling across both B2B and B2C contexts — from managing 450-person international Dell events to scaling LinkedIn communities to 46,000+. Her campaign portfolio spans luxury beauty (Sephora), fintech (MoMo, DarkHorseStocks), F&B (AB InBev, Ferrero), and retail (UNIQLO), demonstrating versatility across industries and a consistent track record of measurable results.
